examples.text: The artifacts indicated the divers had likely found the wreck of La Trinité
examples.explanation: 这些文物表明潜水员很可能发现了‘拉·特里尼特’号的残骸。

reviewSessions.example_text: The artifacts indicated the divers had likely found the wreck of La Trinité
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案部分正确，接近“人工制品”，但未体现“文物”这一常见义项，且“工艺品”语义偏窄。
matched_points: 理解到是人造物品，接近“人工制品”
missing_points: “工艺品”范围较窄，不完全等同于 artifact
结合例句语境，更应理解为“文物”
